name: quick-sand bog
hints: You are sinking in quicksand! There are no regular exits. You must act quickly.
You need to swim out, but you cannot carry too much weight. Drop heavy items first.
SWIM to escape back to the lake. If you are carrying too many items, you are too heavy and will sink. Drop items first.
Drop everything except the blue ox treasure, then SWIM to escape back to the lake (room 10). If too heavy, you sink and die.

effects: Message: Somethings too heavy. I fall.

Message: Try --> `LOOK, JUMP, SWIM, CLIMB, FIND, TAKE, SCORE, DROP`
and any other verbs you can think of...
Message: You may need to say magic words here

notes: Dangerous quicksand bog north of the lake. Contains the blue ox statue treasure. No normal exits - must SWIM out, but only if not carrying too much weight. Drop items to reduce weight before swimming. AT SHORE causes death.
